sections.title: Getting started
sections.description: Install Kraken, define a table, run the first typed query.

sections.title: Schema
sections.description: Domain records, column records, ColumnSet impls, generated columns, insert shapes, custom codecs.

sections.title: Queries
sections.description: from, select, joins, dynamic filters, grouping, subqueries, CTEs, and execution.

sections.title: Expressions
sections.description: Predicates, SQL functions, aggregates, arrays, JSONB, raw SQL, and window functions.

sections.title: Writes
sections.description: insert, returning, bulk insert, update, delete, upsert, update_all, and transactions.

sections.title: Relations
sections.description: has_many, belongs_to, preload, preload_where, nullable joins, anti-joins, and full joins.
